---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement to pg_tre
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What does the current
behavior cost you (correctness, performance, ergonomics)?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the change you'd like to see. SQL surface, GUC,
operator, index option, etc. If you have a draft API in
mind, sketch it here.

## Alternatives Considered

What else did you look at? Other PostgreSQL extensions
(`pg_trgm`, `pg_textsearch`, `pgvector`, FTS), application-
side workarounds, etc.

## Use Case

A concrete query or workload that this would unblock or
make faster.

## Additional Context

Anything else — references to papers, links to related
discussions, prior art in other databases.
